Sample message 
Parents know that when kids get flu, they may miss school for several days, depending on how sick they are. Getting a flu vaccine can reduce their risk of getting sick and help tame flu symptoms if they do get sick. Talk to your child's doctor about how to lower their risk of flu and other respiratory illnesses. https://bit.ly/44zIaek
